hooks.prompt:
Review this tool call about to write or edit code: $ARGUMENTS

Check if any functions, classes, utilities, or logic being added already exist elsewhere in the project. If you detect clear duplication of existing code, return: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "Duplicate detected: <describe what already exists and where>"}}. If no duplication is found, return: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "allow"}}

hooks.statusMessage: Checking file path is within project folder...
